page.title: Marketing
page.subtitle: Draft a lot launch from the real harvest and cup numbers, then you click send.

summary.campaignsSub: {count, plural, one {# on the board} other {# on the board}}
summary.audienceSub: opted in to hear from us

empty.title: No campaigns yet
empty.description: A campaign drafts itself when a lot launches, ships low, or a sample goes out. You can also write one by hand on the right.

triggers.title: What drafts a campaign
triggers.subtitle: Each one writes a draft from real rows. Nothing goes out until you send it.

lot-launch.label: Lot launch
lot-launch.desc: Drafts the moment a green lot is minted.

replenishment.label: Replenishment
replenishment.desc: Drafts when a buyer's lot ships and runs low.

sample-follow-up.label: Sample follow-up
sample-follow-up.desc: Drafts after a sample goes out the door.

console.title: Compose & send
console.mergeTagsHint: Click one to drop it in. It fills from the lot you pick.
console.previewEmpty: Pick a lot to see the merge tags fill in.
console.queued: {count, plural, one {# contact queued} other {# contacts queued}}.
console.queueHint: Builds one message per opted-in contact. Still a draft. Nothing sends.
console.audienceCount: {count, plural, one {# opted-in contact} other {# opted-in contacts}}
console.audienceHint: You can only reach a contact who opted in. The list is the gate.
console.noAudience: No one has opted in yet. Get consent first, then they show up here.

sendDialog.title: Send this campaign
sendDialog.body: You're about to send "{name}" to {count, plural, one {# opted-in contact} other {# opted-in contacts}}. This goes out for real.
sendDialog.noQueue: There's nothing queued to send. Build the send list first.
sendDialog.humanNote: You are signing this send. The app drafts the copy, you decide it goes.
sendDialog.sent: Sent to {count, plural, one {# contact} other {# contacts}}.

delivery.title: Delivery log
delivery.subtitle: Every message that left, with its status.

errors.bodyRequired: Write a subject or a message before saving.
errors.generic: Could not save that. Try again.
errors.queueGeneric: Could not build the send list. Try again.
errors.sendGeneric: Could not send that. Try again.
